name: ghost-browse
description: Lightweight browser-impersonating HTTP client for Bun and Node.js

scripts.clean: bun -e "import { rmSync } from 'node:fs'; rmSync('dist', { recursive: true, force: true })"
scripts.build: bun run clean && bun run build:esm && bun run build:cjs && bun run build:types
scripts.build:esm: bun build src/index.ts --outdir dist --target node --format esm --sourcemap
scripts.build:cjs: bun build src/index.ts --outdir dist-cjs --target node --format cjs --sourcemap && bun -e "import { renameSync, rmSync } from 'node:fs'; renameSync('dist-cjs/index.js', 'dist/index.cjs'); renameSync('dist-cjs/index.js.map', 'dist/index.cjs.map'); rmSync('dist-cjs', { recursive: true, force: true })"
scripts.prepublishOnly: bun run typecheck && bun run test:unit && bun run build
